From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 06 May 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-05-06
Message-ID: <uwb8zJ52RXKt4WlcDSatRg@geopod-ismtpd-2>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="00aacda955f0b38697893831c00f511a13ba8185bae69f965ed472a53c0e"

Hi there, Llama Fans! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including new
tools for building agentic solutions, a powerful multilingual RAG
system, and innovative applications for document processing. Dive
into the highlights and community contributions that showcase the
versatility of LlamaIndex!

🤩 The Highlights:

* PapersChat: An agentic AI application that lets you chat with
your papers and gather information from @arxiv and PubMed. It
indexes all your papers and provides a user-friendly web UI for
querying. Plus, it's open source! Check it out here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bdVRLhJ7BwEEfhQOpyXkTO2tJDeEe362xHwt2O7DfZ8 ).

* Multilingual, Multimodal RAG System: Learn how to create a
powerful Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that handles
multiple languages and modalities seamlessly. Learn more 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6c_opUPLcQBuhqU3voF66j6gFQwAzCcHip0ZNw8X1kg ).

* Deep Researcher Template: Use create-llama's "Deep Researcher"
template to write legal reports in seconds! It generates
sub-questions, answers them, and compiles a report. Try it now 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..2TZJIakJfNwwLMHhk8hXQZwnQsysBykPmd7AWMHxncs ).

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* Invoice Reconciliation Agent: Build an invoice reconciliation
agent using LlamaIndex.TS and LlamaCloud to automatically check
invoice compliance with contracts. This is a great real-world
enterprise use-case. Watch a video of it in action 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Ulpn2wpoM9U9DzhTfJ8ULKN06Vu9LEXa7YG2NFvyLc0 ) or check out the
full code here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Gkn4rhQtSLG6c65VoCFnAI0juEAXRFCM0VLb1gawWl0 ).

* LlamaParse for Financial Applications: Join our workshop hosted
by CEO Jerry Liu to learn how to apply AI to financial challenges
using LlamaParse. Register today ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..NDt5s88tmZKc0doTTU0V4c29CDw55LekZA4EJDbS53w ).

✨ Framework:

* LlamaDeploy Updates: LlamaDeploy now supports a new message
broker, Solace, enhancing its async-first framework for deploying
agentic multi-service systems. Read more 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..mGSoyaEul78MnwSn0RNAJOd9acKIYkTiwSYwEqsN4-0 ).

* New Model Alert: Qwen 3 is out, and benchmarks are impressive!
Our friends at Ollama have already released support for it in
LlamaIndex. Learn how to use it ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Jeh7YzYmOiVo6A9JKN55rOxP8KAoWiQKCpSZS14ToXg ).

✍️ Community:

* Case Study on CondoScan: Discover how CondoScan uses
LlamaIndex's workflows to create a next-generation condo
evaluation tool, reducing document review time from weeks to
minutes. Read the case study ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..b_8E9Q_6Yb8r8Cl2J9C0UOe023Vc53M4KWnn_UDA2JY ).

* Our thoughts on effective agent design: We weighed in 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1di4_WR9RPWUaoGJDN4fc5jqO0GHIgITzGXMHL9Q73I )
 on the optimal design of agents with with our strategy of
mixing the autonomous nature of agents with the deterministic
nature of Workflows.

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..UDoynsC_r_yFcrzgjRXSqHc9pm_bViUx5wOtHvX8hy8 )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7sep5cudmVS8sHsDe6Iiqnq1sYchbZgSdKQRQJSM5xI )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..JZHvKVeopHF36B5vC5itjSKzv0kklAI3ZFG2CEaC0Rs )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
